title: Dill Bliss Soup
description: A creamy and refreshing soup with a hint of dill. Perfect for a light lunch or dinner.

ingredients.name: Bliss (such as cashew or oat milk)

instructions: Heat oil in a large pot over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for another minute.
Stir in the tandoori spice mix and cook for 1-2 minutes.
Add the broth, bliss, and lemon juice. Bring to a simmer.
Add the fresh dill and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes.
Blend the soup until smooth using an immersion blender or a regular blender.
Serve warm, garnished with additional fresh dill if desired.
Note: You can also make this soup in a slow cooker. Simply sauté the onion and garlic in a pan, then transfer everything to the slow cooker and cook on low for 3-4 hours.
